ground_truth.description: Player kills a Zombieman (shotgun guy) with the Super Shotgun. The enemy explodes into gibs, and the player's Super Shotgun ammo count decreases from 38 to 36.

gemini_response.description: Player kills a Zombieman (shotgun guy) with the Super Shotgun. The enemy explodes into gibs, and the player's Super Shotgun ammo count decreases from 38 to 36.
